field_notes.procurement_specs: Material and assay specifications to source; avoid hard-coding one vendor unless necessary.
field_notes.test_articles: Concrete modules/coupons to run in the validation package.
field_notes.run_matrix: Phased tests and controls; design-level, not a wet-lab SOP.
field_notes.assay_panel: Analytical readouts needed to judge suitability.
field_notes.acceptance_gates: Initial pass/fail gates for advancing the candidate.
field_notes.data_capture_fields: Fields that should be logged for every run to enable agent iteration.
field_notes.decision_rules: What to do when gates pass or fail.
field_notes.source_refs: Evidence ids or source URLs that motivate the package.
